templates.title: Data Analysis Assistant
templates.description: Analyze data and provide insights with visualizations suggestions.
templates.content:
Analyze the following data about {{topic}}:
{{data}}

Please provide:
1. Key findings and patterns
2. Statistical analysis
3. Trends and correlations
4. Potential insights
5. Recommended visualizations
6. Actionable recommendations

Context: {{context}}
Target audience: {{audience}}

variables.name: data
variables.defaultValue:
Monthly active users: Jan=1000, Feb=1200, Mar=1100, Apr=1500, May=1800, Jun=2000
Retention rate: 45%
Average session time: 12 minutes
Feature usage: Dashboard=80%, Reports=60%, Settings=20%

variables.name: context
variables.defaultValue: This is a SaaS product launched 6 months ago

examples:
Analyze the following data about customer behavior patterns:
Monthly active users: Jan=1000, Feb=1200, Mar=1100, Apr=1500, May=1800, Jun=2000
Retention rate: 45%
Average session time: 12 minutes
Feature usage: Dashboard=80%, Reports=60%, Settings=20%

Please provide:
1. Key findings and patterns
2. Statistical analysis
3. Trends and correlations
4. Potential insights
5. Recommended visualizations
6. Actionable recommendations

Context: This is a SaaS product launched 6 months ago
Target audience: product managers and executives

templates.title: Research Synthesizer
templates.description: Synthesize research from multiple sources into coherent insights.
templates.content:
Synthesize the following research about {{topic}}:
{{sources}}

Please create:
1. Executive summary
2. Key themes and findings
3. Methodology assessment
4. Gaps in research
5. Contradictions or debates
6. Future research directions

Focus area: {{focus}}
Format: {{format}}

variables.name: topic
variables.defaultValue: impact of remote work on productivity

variables.name: sources
variables.defaultValue:
Study 1: Stanford research showing 13% productivity increase
Study 2: Microsoft study showing collaboration challenges
Study 3: Gallup survey on employee satisfaction

examples:
Synthesize the following research about impact of remote work on productivity:
Study 1: Stanford research showing 13% productivity increase
Study 2: Microsoft study showing collaboration challenges
Study 3: Gallup survey on employee satisfaction

Please create:
1. Executive summary
2. Key themes and findings
3. Methodology assessment
4. Gaps in research
5. Contradictions or debates
6. Future research directions

Focus area: long-term effects on company culture
Format: bullet points with supporting evidence
